answer:
Pipedrive does not offer a permanent free tier for its CRM platform, though it provides a 14-day free trial for all plans [1]. Every paid subscription plan includes access to the Pipedrive REST API at no additional cost [2].

You can obtain your personal API token by navigating to Settings, selecting Personal preferences, and choosing the API menu [3]. Access to the API is subject to daily token-based rate limits and burst limits, which scale based on your subscription tier (Lite, Growth, Premium, or Ultimate) [4]. Higher limits can be obtained by upgrading your plan or purchasing API token top-ups [4][5].
